name: Furis
description: The Furis delivers a high damage output in a short time frame thanks to its high rate of fire.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Furis delivers a high damage output in a short time frame thanks to its high rate of fire.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Skins not applying to the Dex Furis Magazines.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Furis missing its magazine. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1147887-furis-magazine-texture-glitch/

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.17.3
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance issues when firing the Furis or Kohm.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Mastery Rank 2 requirement from the MK1-Furis.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Forest Camo Skin not applying properly to the Furis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0
patchlogs.changes: The Furis has received an updated look and given the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: The Furis and Afuris have received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Mk1 Furis 35 to 20
Furis 35 to 20
Dual Furis 70 to 40
Dex Furis 100 to 50

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Reduced the damage of MK-1 Furis in the Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the damage of the Furis and Dex Furis in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Furis series damage reduced in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where ejected Furis clips would hang in the air after reloading.
Fixed an issue where Furis and Dex Furis ejected or loaded clips would not have proper skins or colours.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed MK1-Furis showing a price of 120 Platinum in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Dex Dakra and Dex Furis have been enabled in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Furis: Winds of Purity: adds 0.1 life steal

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed issue with Dex Furis muzzle flash not being customizable.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Limited the max instances of Dex Furis fire sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
